name: Reyes, Irma
evidence: Austin-based Democratic political operative; public records (LegiStorm) document an Irma M. Reyes who served as staff to a TX House Democrat and Executive Director of the Mexican American Legislative Caucus, consistent with donor's self-reported roles (Political director/Senior strategist at Beto for Texas and Texas House Democratic Caucus). No FEC PAC or lobbyist registration found.

affiliations.snippet: Executive Director, Mexican American Legislative Caucus; previously staff to State Rep. Victoria Neave Criado (D-TX).

name: Sanchez, Bethbiriah
evidence: Bethbiriah 'Beth' Sanchez, Austin native, licensed by State Bar of Texas May 2016, founder/principal of Sanchez Law (personal injury firm, 4360 S Congress Ave, 78745). Founder of nonprofit Community By Sanchez. No FEC PAC donations or TX lobbyist registration found.

affiliations.snippet: Beth Sanchez is listed as Founder of Community by Sanchez, a nonprofit creating educational pathways, scholarships and mentorship for underserved families.

name: Rodriguez III, Donato
evidence: Donor self-reports COA (City of Austin) and Retired. No public bio, FEC PAC contribution, or TX lobbyist record located; categorized by employer as retired municipal (City of Austin) employee.

name: Valencia, Blanca Nereida
evidence: Blanca Nereida Valencia is a Round Rock ISD educator/administrator (named Success High School principal 2024; prior assistant principal at RRISD Opportunity Center). Confirmed via RRISD news and Voyage Austin bio. No FEC PAC donations or TX lobbyist registration found.

affiliations.role: Vice President and founding board member
affiliations.snippet: Valencia is Vice President and founding board member of Contigo Wellness Foundation, addressing mental health stigma in BIPOC communities; describes herself as a social justice activist and educator focused on equity.

name: Natsheh, Hatem
evidence: Self-employed convenience store (Kwik Mart) owner in Austin. A Hatem Natsheh (self-employed, Austin) appears in FEC records with a small-dollar contribution to Bernie 2020; high FEC donation count (54) consistent with a recurring small-dollar donor. No PAC/advocacy-org affiliation documented; industry classified by employer.

name: Sokolic, Katherine
evidence: Kathy Sokolic is an Austin realtor at Compass/Realty Austin; office at 4646 Mueller Blvd, 78723 matches donor zip. Chair of her Mueller-area neighborhood association. No federal PAC or TX lobbyist record found.

affiliations.snippet: serves as Chair of her neighborhood association, organizing neighborhood block captains, and planning block parties and fall festivals

name: Juarez Rosales, Armandina
evidence: Out-of-Austin donor (Porter TX 77365), self-employed/retired. No public record identifying this specific person or a former career was found; unable to corroborate industry.

name: Alderete, Carina
evidence: Carina Alderete is an Austin-based marketing/VP-level executive at Accenture (LinkedIn, theorg) and serves on the City of Austin Technology + Telecommunications Commission since Oct 2023. No federal PAC or TX lobbyist record found.

affiliations.snippet: serving as a Board Member for the Technology + Telecommunications Commission for the City of Austin since October 2023

name: Velasquez, Julius
evidence: Listed as a Planner at Capital Metro, Austin's public transit authority (Buda TX 78610). Could not independently confirm the specific individual online; industry assigned by employer fallback. Surname shared with candidate but no family relation is documented in any public record.

name: Coufal, Liz
evidence: Liz Coufal is Co-founder & COO of Valkyrie (valkyrie.ai / valkyrie.science), the Austin applied-sciences/AI lab. She also co-founded GoodPolitics, an Austin nonpartisan 501(c)(4) civic-engagement organization. No federal PAC or TX lobbyist record found.

affiliations.snippet: GoodPolitics is a 501(c)(4) ... Founded in 2018 by Nathan Ryan and Liz Coufal ... a formal series of nonpartisan, big tent 'political parties'

name: Baez, III, Celso
evidence: Celso Baez III is Director of Strategy & Texas Branch Manager who launched LINK Strategic Partners' Austin office (June 2022); prior public-sector roles at CapMetro, Austin ISD, Central Health. Matches occupation 'Director of Strategy' / employer 'Link'.

affiliations.org: I Live Here I Give Here
affiliations.snippet: Board & leadership affiliations list I Live Here I Give Here Board of Directors (current).

affiliations.snippet: Appointed advisory roles include City of Austin Urban Transportation Commission and the Mayor's Task Force on Institutional Racism and Systemic Inequities.
Former President of the La Fuente Learning Center Board.

name: Cottingim, Krista
evidence: Distinctive name matches Krista Cottingim, co-founder/owner of Hustle for the Cause, an Austin creative social-impact studio (produces Chingona Fest Texas). Consistent with self-employed 'Consultant'; 78747 zip not independently confirmed.

affiliations.snippet: Austin-based social-impact production company owned and operated by LGBTQ women of color (Denise Hernandez and Krista Cottingim); produces the Latina-empowerment Chingona Fest Texas.

name: Rios Valdez, Rosa

evidence: Distinctive name matches Rosa Rios Valdez, founder and longtime CEO (now Founder Emerita / Founder in Residence) of BCL of Texas, a nonprofit CDFI community lender in Austin. Occupation field was garbage ('Xx'); SW-Austin 78736 zip plausible but not independently confirmed.

affiliations.org: BCL of Texas (Business & Community Lenders of Texas)
affiliations.snippet: Founded BCL and for 34 years advanced economic opportunity for underserved Texas communities; recognized among 25 Latina-led CDFIs nationally.

affiliations.snippet: Maria Alicia Ramirez CPA PC listed as a GAHCC member providing accounting/audit/tax services.

name: Candelas, Elaine
evidence: Public records place an Elaine Candelas in Austin 78702, corroborating the donor's zip; stated employer Apple in a sales-operations role is consistent with Apple's large Austin workforce. No further public professional profile or affiliations found.

name: Israel, Celia
evidence: Confirmed Celia Marie Israel, elected Travis County Tax Assessor-Collector (sworn in Jan 3, 2025); former 4-term TX State Rep (District 50), 2022 Austin mayoral runoff candidate, Democrat. Employer 'Travis County / Tax Assessor' matches exactly. (Surname 'Israel' is unrelated to Israel/Palestine policy.)

affiliations.snippet: Represented the 50th district in the Texas House; four-term Democratic state representative, succeeded by James Talarico when she ran for Austin mayor.
As a state representative, Israel co-founded the LGBTQ Caucus in the Texas House.
Featured as an endorsed candidate by LPAC, a national LGBTQ women's political action committee.

name: Becerra, Jesus
evidence: No distinct public profile confirming this specific Jesus Becerra (Buda TX, 78610) as an Amegy Bank commercial-banking VP; generic name yielded unrelated profiles. Industry assigned by employer fallback (Amegy Bank = commercial bank).

name: Pena, Maria
evidence: Community Impact profile identifies Maria Peña as vice president of Donn's Barbecue, daughter of owner Jose Guerrero, operating all three Austin locations; matches donor 'Owner, Donn's BBQ,' zip 78744 Austin.

name: Alexander, Samantha
evidence: Confirmed as CapMetro's EVP / Chief Experience and Engagement Officer (CXO); joined CapMetro 2019; prior City of Austin and Austin ISD public affairs roles. Matches occupation 'CXO,' employer 'Capital Metro.'
